label: cache proof • second turn in one session must reuse the shared prefix
query: Summarize in one sentence: the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog, again and again, every single morning before breakfast.
notes: The minimal scored reuse row: two turns in one session share the system-prompt + turn-1 prefix, so the reuse counter must move at least once on turn 2. Topology-aware: on full-attention models the floor reads kvPrefixHitsDelta; on hybrid-SSM models the runner applies the same floor to ssmCompanionHitsDelta (KV counters stay 0 there by design) and requireCompanionOnHybrid (default true) additionally demands companion movement. SKIPs on hosts with no local MLX engine. Off-CI (needs a local model).

followUpTurns: Now say the same thing but as a haiku.
